any other Executive order, Presidential proclamation, law of the United States, directive of the Armed Forces of the United States, or other action taken by or on behalf of the United States or its agents, representatives, officers, or employees, respecting the evacuation, relocation, or internment of individuals solely on the basis of Japanese ancestry;

children.heading: Recommendations for pardons
children.label: b Recommendations for pardons
children.text: Based upon any review under subsection (a), the Attorney General is requested to recommend to the President for pardon consideration those convictions which the Attorney General considers appropriate.

children.heading: Action by the President
children.label: c Action by the President
children.text: In consideration of the statement of the Congress set forth in , the President is requested to offer pardons to any individuals recommended by the Attorney General under subsection (b).section 4202(a) of this title
